His remarks come amid debate over future Fed policy under Kevin Warsh, who favours a smaller balance sheet approach debate continues.

Despite strong fundamentals and technicals, experts advise caution for fresh investors due to its high valuation, suggesting partial profit-booking for existing shareholders.

business.title: Petrol crosses ₹107 mark, diesel above ₹93 in Jaipur after Centre hikes fuel prices by ₹3 per litre
business.summary: New Delhi, petrol prices rose from ₹94.77 to ₹97.77 per litre, while diesel prices increased from ₹87.67 to ₹90.67 per litre

business.title: US set to drop criminal fraud case against Gautam Adani, sources say, as deal reached in civil case
business.summary: Adani had publicly promised to invest ‌that ⁠amount and create 15,000 jobs in the US after Trump's victory in the ⁠2024 election

business.title: HAL shares drop over 4% after Q4 results. What are Goldman Sachs and Nomura saying?
business.summary: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited shares fell over 4% despite reporting steady Q4FY26 earnings growth, strong sequential performance and higher annual profit. While Nomura maintained a ‘Buy’ rating, citing strong order backlog and valuations, Goldman Sachs stayed ‘Neutral’, pointing to weaker execution and margin pressure despite robust revenue visibility.

business.title: US Stock Market: Bond markets brace for higher-for-longer yields amid oil price surge
business.summary: Investors anticipate prolonged elevated U.S. Treasury yields due to inflation concerns, particularly from surging oil prices amid Middle East conflict. Incoming Fed Chair Kevin Warsh faces challenges containing these pressures, as persistent inflation and potential policy shifts could further impact yields and economic growth.

business.title: Tata Motors PV shares rally 8% even as Q4 net profit drops 32% YoY. Here's what Macquarie, Jefferies & other brokerages say
business.summary: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles shares jumped significantly after reporting a profit drop for the fourth quarter of FY26. Revenue from operations saw an increase. The company also recommended a final dividend. Brokerage firms offered varied opinions, with some remaining bullish and others cautious about the automaker's future prospects. Concerns persist regarding Jaguar Land Rover's performance.

business.title: Markets eye FII return with Rupee stability, tax relief taking centre stage: Asit Bhandarkar
business.summary: Foreign investors are hesitant to re-engage with Indian markets until the rupee stabilizes and the government demonstrates a willingness to compromise. Despite concerns about banking sector headwinds and geopolitical risks, the market is looking past near-term volatility. For investors with an 18-24 month horizon, current market corrections present a significant opportunity.

business.title: US Stock Market: Fed’s Barr warns against easing bank liquidity rules to shrink balance sheet
business.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr cautioned against shrinking the US central bank’s balance sheet by easing bank liquidity requirements, warning it could weaken financial stability and increase crisis risks. His remarks come amid debate over future Fed policy under Kevin Warsh, who favours a smaller balance sheet approach debate continues.

business.title: Should Titan shareholders worry about recent gold import duty hike? Let 2013 customs move explain
business.summary: Titan Company shareholders are concerned about the recent import duty hike on gold and silver. This move has caused panic in jewellery stocks. However, historical data from 2013 suggests that such disruptions can strengthen organised players like Titan. The company's strong brand, resilient margins, and customer base position it well to navigate these challenges and potentially gain market share.

business.title: Hormuz crossfire, 'duck diplomacy': Decoding India's high-stakes balancing act at BRICS meet
business.summary: With the recent inclusion of nations like Iran and the UAE, the bloc now houses factions actively engaged in regional hostilities

business.summary: Move comes after prolonged freeze as companies face heavy under-recoveries

business.title: Iranian Foreign Minister urges BRICS unity against ‘US bullying’
business.summary: He urged BRICS nations to respond collectively and more assertively

business.title: Sensex rises over 400 points, Nifty above 23,800 even as rupee declines, oil prices rise
business.summary: Indian stock markets opened higher for the third straight day, with Sensex and Nifty posting modest gains. This positive sentiment was broad-based, with mid and small-cap indices also trading in the green. Nifty IT led sectoral gains, while Nifty PSU Bank saw a decline.

business.title: Global Market: Japan wholesale inflation hits 3-year high amid Iran oil shock
business.summary: Japan's wholesale inflation surged to its fastest pace in nearly three years in April, driven by rising energy and commodity prices linked to the Iran conflict. This acceleration has intensified expectations that the Bank of Japan may raise interest rates as early as June, with markets pricing in a high probability of a hike.

business.title: Tripura becomes first State in India to complete all deregulation priority areas under Phase I and Phase II
business.summary: A major focus of the initiative was simplifying land and urban governance processes

business.title: Had Vijay campaigned for six months, DMK would not have even won five seats, says TVK's Aadhav Arjuna
business.summary: Arjuna alleges that ‘horse-trading politics’ took place within DMK, claims that attempts were made to prevent Vijay from becoming Chief Minister

business.title: Trump traded Nvidia, Boeing, Intel in flurry of transactions in first quarter of the year
business.summary: The transactions, spelled out in documents filed with the US Office of Government Ethics, encompass more than 100 pages

business.title: Clear why PM agreed to trade deal, halted Op Sindoor: Cong on ‘US to drop’ charges against Adani
business.summary: The opposition party’s attack came after media reports claimed that US authorities are moving to settle the fraud charges against the Indian billionaire

business.title: Silver tumbles Rs 11,700, gold down Rs 1,600 as Iran war tensions stoke inflation worries. All eyes on Trump-Xi meet
business.summary: Gold and silver prices opened sharply lower on MCX Friday, driven by rising energy prices fueling inflation concerns and expectations of prolonged high interest rates. Investors are closely watching U.S.-China trade talks, with gold and silver futures experiencing significant dips. Spot gold and silver also declined internationally, reflecting market pressure.

business.title: Alphabet sells yen bonds worth $3.6 billion, largest such issue by foreign company
business.summary: Alphabet has issued a record-breaking 576.5 billion yen ($3.6 billion) in yen-denominated bonds, marking its first such debt offering. This move supports its substantial AI investment program and funding diversification efforts. The issuance saw strong demand from investors, surpassing Berkshire Hathaway's previous record.

business.title: HPCL, BPCL and IOC shares slide up to 3% after petrol, diesel price hike
business.summary: Oil marketing company shares fell on Friday. Petrol and diesel prices saw a modest increase. This hike aims to ease financial pressure on companies. Global crude oil prices remain high due to West Asia conflicts. Prime Minister Modi urged fuel conservation. Oil Minister Hardeep Singh Puri expressed concern over companies absorbing losses.

business.title: ​Paytm, Urban Company among 10 companies with highest FII shareholding in Q4. Check full list
business.summary: ​Foreign investors are showing interest in select Indian companies. Despite a significant outflow from Indian equities, some firms have attracted substantial FII investment. Le Travenues Technology leads with the highest FII stake. Other notable companies include 360 One WAM, Redington, CarTrade Tech, and Agarwal's Health Care.​

business.title: Adani Power vs. Green vs. Energy: Why mutual funds are betting billions on this electrification trio
business.summary: Indian mutual funds are significantly increasing their stakes in Adani Power, Adani Green Energy, and Adani Energy Solutions. This strategic shift indicates a strong conviction in India's electrification drive. These companies are seen as key players in meeting the nation's growing demand for electricity driven by data centers, electric vehicles, and manufacturing.
